basics.name: Daniel Rossi
basics.summary: PhD researcher specializing in computer vision and embedded AI. Experienced in developing efficient deep learning models for real-time applications on edge devices. Passionate about advancing AI technologies for practical use cases such as emergency response and robotics.

work.name: AImageLab, Università di Modena e Reggio Emilia
work.summary: Research on 3D scene and human reconstruction using NeRF and Gaussian Splatting. Model compression and efficiency enhancement for real-time inference on edge devices. Emergency response and surveillance classification models for drones and UAVs.

work.name: Toyota Motor Europe
work.summary: Designed transformer-based models for 3D human pose estimation and temporal tracking. Developed CNN-based ergonomics monitoring system with web dashboard.

work.name: ProjectRED
work.summary: Implemented real-time object detection for robotic pick-and-place tasks using YOLOv5 and ROS. Developed ArUco-based navigation and CAN bus firmware for STM32.

work.name: WATER LINE S.R.L.
work.summary: Developed firmware in C/C++ for IoT drink dispensers. Built desktop tools with C# WPF and PyQt5.

education.institution: Università di Modena e Reggio Emilia
courses: Advanced Methodologies and Technologies for Neurophysiological Research
Machine Learning Applications in Trading and Portfolio Management
Explainable AI in the Neural Network Domain

education.institution: Università di Modena e Reggio Emilia
Università di Modena e Reggio Emilia

awards.title: International Computer Vision Summer School (ICVSS)
awards.summary: Selected participant for advanced lectures on Computer Vision, 3D Scene Understanding, and Efficient Deep Learning. Successfully passed the final examination.

publications.name: TakuNet: an Energy-Efficient CNN for Real-Time Inference on Embedded UAV systems in Emergency Response Scenarios
publications.publisher: IEEE/CVF Winter Conference on Applications of Computer Vision Workshops (WACVW)
publications.summary: Presented an energy-efficient CNN designed for real-time inference on embedded UAV systems. Achieves near state-of-the-art accuracy with extreme efficiency on edge devices like Jetson Orin Nano and Raspberry Pi

publications.name: AutoDock-AI: a Docker-based Framework Accelerating Artificial Intelligence Research
publications.summary: Docker-based framework providing automatic device detection, environment setup, and seamless development workflows for AI research on embedded platforms.

projects.name: TakuNet
projects.summary: Energy-efficient CNN for real-time inference on embedded UAV systems in emergency response scenarios. Achieves near-SOTA accuracy with minimal computational requirements.

projects.name: AutoDock
projects.summary: Docker-based framework accelerating AI research with automatic device detection and environment setup for Jetson and Raspberry Pi platforms.

projects.name: EdgePowerMeter
projects.summary: High-precision power monitoring system for edge AI devices with real-time visualization and analysis tools.

projects.name: RL-Swarm
projects.summary: Multi-agent reinforcement learning framework with pheromone-based perception for swarm intelligence applications.
